## Summary

- Describe what changed and why.

## Cleanup Classification (if applicable)

- [ ] keep/remove/defer decisions documented
- [ ] removal rationale recorded
- [ ] deferred items include owner, reason, and target milestone/date

## Validation Evidence

- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] targeted high-signal regressions executed when behavior-affecting files changed

## Hygiene Check

- [ ] no one-off status artifacts or temporary generated outputs committed
- [ ] ignore rules respected
- [ ] docs updated where contributor workflow changed
